key_changes_required: Deduplication of correlated expansion score contributions (trigger_source_id) in Step 2.2b (P1)
Fallback guard in routing_adjust_expansion_tier for empty/invalid return values (P1)
Adjacency transfer domain-intersection check before score→tier mapping (P1)
domain_complexity and max_model fields in agent-roles.yaml for two-axis tier decision (P2)
tier field in per-finding log output for future weighted synthesis (P2)
Upgrade pass recycling token savings into borderline-score agent upgrades (P2)

convergence.on_two_axis_tier_decision: 3 of 4 agents (tameshigiri primary, wayfinding + glassblowing reinforce)
convergence.on_synthesis_gap: 1 of 4 agents (glassblowing; others deferred per anti_overlap)

recommendation: Proceed to implementation with three pre-land changes: add trigger_source_id deduplication in expansion scoring, add fallback guard to routing_adjust_expansion_tier, add adjacency domain-intersection check. In first iteration: add domain_complexity + max_model to agent-roles.yaml, emit tier in finding log, add upgrade pass for token savings recycling. The A+C hybrid design is validated across all four distant domains.

fd-polynesian-wayfinding.key_concern: Correlated signals inflate expansion score; score=1 downgrade inverts correct response for complex domains
